name: stela
description: Postgres-backed TypeScript workflow engine for durable jobs, events, retries, and background processing.

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/cli && npm run build -w examples/basic && npm run build -w examples/email-drip && npm run build -w examples/payment && npm run build -w examples/agent-research && npm run build -w examples/support-triage && npm run build -w examples/financial-kyc && npm run build -w examples/chargeback-evidence && npm run build -w examples/incident-runbook
